description_long: This guard rail is constructed from a series of vertical posts topped with pointed finials, connected by two horizontal rails and reinforced with a grid of smaller horizontal and vertical bars. The posts and rails are made of a dark, likely metallic material, giving the structure a robust and secure appearance. The pointed finials atop each post add a decorative yet functional deterrent against climbing. The rail is relatively low in height, suitable for demarcating boundaries in urban environments such as parks, sidewalks, or residential areas. The surface appears smooth and slightly glossy, suggesting a powder-coated or painted finish for weather resistance. There are no visible reflective markings or additional safety features on the rail.
description: A dark metal guard rail with pointed finials, horizontal rails, and a grid pattern, designed for urban boundary demarcation. The surface is smooth and slightly glossy, with a robust and decorative appearance.
description_view_0: A direct end-on view showing a single vertical post with a pointed finial and decorative detailing.
description_view_1: A perspective view displaying the full length of the guard rail, revealing the grid pattern, multiple posts, and pointed finials.
description_view_2: Another end-on view, similar to view 0, showing the vertical post and its pointed finial from the opposite side.
description_view_3: A perspective view from the opposite side of view 1, again showing the full length, grid pattern, and pointed finials.
